title: Most Accurate Translations
wikitext:
[]: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by Eva Naut » Wed Oct 07, 2009 7:30 am Which DVD set, Perfect collection, platinum, or perfect platinum has the most accurate subtitle translations? Which ones do the admins use as reference?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Wed Oct 07, 2009 2:08 pm Perfect platinum?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Naut » Wed Oct 07, 2009 2:12 pm AchtungAffen wrote: Perfect platinum?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Oct 07, 2009 11:34 pm Platinum, definitely. AFAIK, in terms of everything besides packaging, all of the Platinum editions are identical. The only difference is between the Platinums and original Perfect.

[]: Re: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Oct 10, 2009 9:01 pm Eva Naut wrote: Which DVD set, Perfect collection, platinum, or perfect platinum has the most accurate subtitle translations? Which ones do the admins use as reference?

[]: Re: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Oct 11, 2009 12:13 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Eva Naut wrote: Which DVD set, Perfect collection, platinum, or perfect platinum has the most accurate subtitle translations? Which ones do the admins use as reference?

[]: Re: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by Eva Naut » Sun Oct 11, 2009 3:22 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Eva Naut wrote: Which DVD set, Perfect collection, platinum, or perfect platinum has the most accurate subtitle translations? Which ones do the admins use as reference?

[]: Re: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Oct 11, 2009 3:28 pm Eva Naut wrote: Huh, what about the platinum perfect?

[]: Re: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Oct 11, 2009 10:35 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Eva Naut wrote: Huh, what about the platinum perfect?

[]: Re: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by Eva Naut » Mon Oct 12, 2009 11:52 am Are there any Japanese extras?

[]: Re: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 12, 2009 12:15 pm Eva Naut wrote: Are there any Japanese extras?

[]: Re: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by Eva Naut » Mon Oct 12, 2009 12:17 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Eva Naut wrote: Are there any Japanese extras?

[]: Re: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 12, 2009 12:20 pm Eva Naut wrote: I meant are there any interviews or extras featuring the Japanese staff?

[]: Re: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by Eva Naut » Mon Oct 12, 2009 2:09 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Eva Naut wrote: I meant are there any interviews or extras featuring the Japanese staff?

[]: Re: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 12, 2009 3:35 pm Eva Naut wrote: I don't know are there?

[]: Re: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Oct 12, 2009 4:38 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Eva Naut wrote: I meant are there any interviews or extras featuring the Japanese staff?

[]: Re: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 12, 2009 5:59 pm Alaska Slim wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Eva Naut wrote: I meant are there any interviews or extras featuring the Japanese staff?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Oct 12, 2009 6:13 pm Only DVD I know of that has the original Japanese staff on the extras is Gurren Lagann. Yoko goes to GAINAX. and GAINAX staff interviews.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Oct 12, 2009 7:36 pm Spirited Away has the original Japanese making-of the film. I was quite impressed. Maybe I shouldn't be, but I don't know. I don't watch a ton of anime. But, unless you count the animatics (basically storyboards and very rough, mostly uncolored animation on very grainy, beat-up film with no dialogue whatsoever) then, no. Evangelion has no Japanese extras.
summary:
[]: Most Accurate Translations             Quote Post by Eva Naut » Wed Oct 07, 2009 7:30 am Which DVD set, Perfect collection, platinum, or perfect platinum has the most accurate subtitle translations? Which ones do the admins use as reference?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Wed Oct 07, 2009 2:08 pm Perfect platinum?

[]:         &nbsp
